sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24101" key="*decw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Δεξώ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦς</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n24101.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Receiver,</tr_> Com. name of a corrupt person, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:401" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">401</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
